news.t: The 7 Best SPDR ETFs to Buy and Hold

holdings.infoBox: VLU is an equity ETF with a total of 1496 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 2.60%, Berkshire Hathaway at 2.50%, Microsoft at 2.33%, Apple at 1.92%, and Alphabet at 1.69%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P 1500 Value Tilt ETF (VLU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 1500 Low Valuation Tilt index. The fund tracks an index that weights securities according to a combination of fundamental factors, and aims to find those with lower prices relative to valuations. VLU was launched on Oct 24, 2012 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: The 7 Best SPDR ETFs to Buy and Hold
data.text: State Street's job as an investment manager is to get you from point A to point B with as little pain as possible, and hopefully, plenty of assets in your retirement portfolio. And to its credit, many...
